steps.script: () => { const b=document.querySelector('.ml-hero__btn'); const cs=b?getComputedStyle(b):null; return { theme:(window.Shopify&&Shopify.theme&&Shopify.theme.id)||null, bg: cs&&cs.backgroundColor, color: cs&&cs.color, border: cs&&cs.border, radius: cs&&cs.borderRadius, fontSize: cs&&cs.fontSize, padding: cs&&cs.padding, label:(b&&b.textContent||'').trim() }; }
